message:
feat(core): viewport reflow planner with priority-batched scheduling (wa-1u90p.3.8)

Introduce `viewport_reflow_planner` module (482 LOC) implementing the
planning layer for priority-ordered terminal reflow after resize events:

- `ReflowBatchPriority` enum: ViewportCore (visible lines, highest
  urgency), ViewportOverscan (near-visible context), ColdScrollback
  (background convergence work) — each mapped to a
  `ResizeWorkClass` for scheduler integration
- Deterministic viewport/overscan/cold-scrollback batching that
  partitions scrollback lines into priority lanes based on their
  distance from the current viewport
- Frame-budget-aware batch selection for immediate work, allowing
  the resize worker to process high-priority viewport lines within
  a single frame budget while deferring cold scrollback
- Scheduler hook projection with explicit rationale text for
  structured logging and telemetry

Registers the module in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
